privileged_info_summary: The task operates on real-world San Francisco UrbanSim datasets (sanfran_public.h5 and zones.json) downloaded from the official UDST GitHub repository. All output paths claimed in the metadata, including the notebook, building/summary CSVs, and map PNG, have been confirmed to match the exact paths expected by the environment setup, export script, and verifier logic.
